subject: feat(nav): replace inline nav links with burger menu
body:
Moved Projects/Tools/Patterns links, theme toggle, and Save as PDF into
a disclosure-pattern burger dropdown. Header is now just logo + title +
burger icon — cleaner on all screen sizes.

Burger menu uses aria-expanded (not role="menu") per WAI-ARIA disclosure
pattern. Closes on backdrop click, Escape key, and item click. Theme
toggle stays open for quick toggling. iOS Safari backdrop click handled
via cursor-pointer. Focus management: first item on open, trigger on close.

Tags: ui, nav, accessibility
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: header-styling
Semver: minor
